name: @thingblock/thingblock-resource
description: Scratch-plane resource pack: device manifests, peripheral blocks, Arduino codegen, and vendored library sources, built to importable ESM and served by the local helper.
author: ThingEdu

scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && vite build && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs && node scripts/zip-pack.mjs
